action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_vitals
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current physiological vital signs of the patient, including heart rate, respiratory rate, and mucous membrane color.

patient_name.description: The name of the patient to observe.

action_set_definitions.name: assess_hemorrhage_severity
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a diagnostic assessment (like a FAST scan) to determine the rate and source of internal bleeding.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_iv_crystalloids
action_set_definitions.description: Administers a specified volume of crystalloid fluids intravenously to restore circulating volume in the absence of blood products.

volume_ml.description: The volume of fluid to administer in milliliters.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_emergency_hemostasis
action_set_definitions.description: Conducts emergency surgical or procedural intervention to stop active internal bleeding and repair damaged vasculature.

action_set_definitions.name: check_stabilization_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the environment to check if the patient meets the 'Stable' criteria and provides the current heart rate.

state_description.patient_id: Unique identifier for the animal patient.
state_description.species: The species of the animal (e.g., Dog, Cat, Exotic).
state_description.heart_rate_bpm: The actual underlying heart rate in beats per minute.
state_description.respiratory_rate_brpm: The actual underlying respiratory rate in breaths per minute.
state_description.mucous_membrane_color: The clinical color of gums (e.g., Pink, Pale, Cyanotic, Icteric).
state_description.consciousness_level: The neurological status (e.g., Alert, Depressed, Obtunded, Comatose).
state_description.internal_hemorrhage_rate: Hidden variable representing rate of blood loss (0.0 - 1.0).
state_description.is_stable: Whether the patient's condition is currently worsening or steady.
